title: Default Login Redirect with View and Login Tracking Parameters
description:
After login, redirect users to the dashboard with URL parameters for analytics tracking. The default landing should include `view=dictionary` and `login=true` parameters so analytics can identify when users have freshly logged in and which view they land on.

### URL Format
`/dashboard?view=dictionary&login=true`

The `/dashboard` and `/objects` pages should always include a `view` parameter for analytics purposes.
acceptance_criteria: Post-login redirect includes view=dictionary and login=true URL parameters
Dashboard and objects pages always include a view parameter
Analytics can distinguish fresh login sessions from regular navigation
middleware_changes: Login redirect logic updated to append view=dictionary&login=true parameters. Dashboard and objects routes ensure view parameter is always present.
implementation_notes: Simple redirect parameter addition for analytics tracking purposes.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented and marked ready for review.
